global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with various shapes and text elements promoting an exclusive offer.
global.main_message: Promoting a free trial for FluxStream.

elements.label: blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant backdrop for the other elements.

elements.label: central graphic
elements.description: A large rectangular shape in the center, possibly representing a product or app interface, with a smooth outline.

elements.label: oval shape
elements.description: An oval shape positioned centrally, adding a decorative touch to the layout.

elements.label: smaller rectangle
elements.description: A smaller rectangular shape located in the center, complementing the main subject.

elements.label: top logo
elements.description: A small logo or icon positioned at the top left, possibly representing the brand.

elements.label: exclusive offer text
elements.description: Text that reads 'Exclusive tonight Start free today', displayed prominently in a bold font.

elements.label: call to action
elements.description: A button or text at the bottom that says 'Try for free', designed to attract user interaction.

elements.label: decorative circles
elements.description: Two small circular shapes positioned centrally, serving as decorative elements.

elements.label: headline text
elements.description: The word 'FluxStream' displayed prominently at the top in a large, bold font.

elements.label: offer details
elements.description: Text that provides details about the offer, positioned centrally and designed to be eye-catching.

elements.label: bottom call to action
elements.description: A button or text at the bottom that encourages users to take action, designed to stand out.
